name: Maheshwar Fort
description: An elegant riverfront fort town on the Narmada, Maheshwar is famous for its serene ghats, royal palace, and the exquisite Maheshwari silk handloom industry.
history: Was the capital of Queen Ahilyabai Holkar in the 18th century. She was a visionary ruler who built numerous temples and promoted the local weaving tradition.
famousFor: Maheshwari Sarees, Ahilyabai Fort, and Narmada Ghats.
